claim_boundary: Failure-analysis artifact only; no G005 completion, no D2E G-IDM win, no FDM-1 parity claim.
interpretation: Adding temporal key-span diffusion and span-aware max aggregation did not recover D2E paper-compatible keyboard or mouse-button metrics.
The previous temporal button-span probe had one exact mouse-button TP; this key-span calibrated variant regressed to zero exact TP while keeping no-button FPR below 0.10.
The branch remains recipe-faithful as a public FDM-1 approximation (video-token pretraining plus noncausal masked action-token span denoising), but it is not competitive with D2E G-IDM targets.

GPU monitor shows the bounded 1xH200 probe is dominated by CPU row loading/calibration/prediction around a small model; next run should either vectorize/cache feature tensors or move to a stronger model where H200 compute is actually used.
next_recipe_faithful_actions: Avoid more threshold-only/key-span tweaks on this compact luma factorized head; it has repeatedly produced zero keyboard accuracy and zero semantic button overlap.
Implement a sequence-level masked action-token IDM with explicit temporal token positions/windows and cached tensorized features so calibration/prediction are batched and GPU-dominant.
For IDM, prioritize FDM-1-like masked diffusion over full action-token sequences (not factor-only heads) using compact video tokens or stronger cached video embeddings before another H200 probe.
Carry this negative evidence into the G005 decision log; do not checkpoint G005 complete.
